title: Analytics - Firmware Update
scenario: After completing a DFU on any headset, the Firebase page displays default elements and event-specific parameters, with event counts increasing after a few hours.
steps: Log the outcome of a firmware update.
Verify that the page displays default elements: graph, events in last 30 minutes, event count by country/gender, events per session, app version, app build, app environment.

Verify that the page displays event-specific parameters: Success, Device Name, Firmware Update Status, Current/Target Headset Version, Current/Target Charge Case Version, Current/Target Charge Stand Version, Current/Target Language ID, Target Language Name, Headset/Charge Case/Charge Stand Progress, Headset/Charge Case/Charge Stand Update Time in Seconds, and Error Description.
Complete a DFU (Device Firmware Update) on any headset.
Check that event counts for related elements have increased.
expected: After completing a DFU on any headset, event counts for related elements increase after a few hours.
